White Dragon Scale Sash  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 10
WIS: +15 HP: +90 MANA: +90
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: CLR DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
White Dragon Scale Sash
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 10
WIS: +15 HP: +90 MANA: +90
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: CLR DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Ornate Sash of the Kromzek Kings
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Icks
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:07
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
King Tormax


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded July 1st, 2023 by Craigy
Updated July 2nd, 2023

Post Comment
Solo Cleric
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2003 at 9:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254405808
View User Forum
14 posts
I would add that clerics can solo. I am 50th level now and I solo most of the time, and not just undead. "fear kite" and "chain stunning" that is our trick.(At least it is mine)

The AC is nice, but the saves and Wiz are what I would be after. My guild calls me 'the fearless' because the gear I use still, was all obtained by 30th level. and only 3 items where bought. Time for an upgrade to my Purity belt. ;-)

IMHO All classes can solo, you just have to find a stile that works for you. I have a druid and never did learn to quad-kite well. to each there own. Peace to all.

pretty...Well said.

# Sep 05 2003 at 10:33 PM Rating: Default

Wow....some people are retards...i guess there is nothing i can do about it...... again i say SHUT UP .... MONKS CANNOT USE THIS ITEM SO JUST DROP IT AND POST SOMETHING USEFULL!!!!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 26 2003 at 5:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i hate monks
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 21 2002 at 10:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is not monk usable, go complain about monks somewhere else
Back off
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2002 at 8:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966195524
9 posts
I am a monk myself, all you who say items like this are better of as Monk items are drunk.. Thats just a waste of the 90mana and the 10 wisdom. Hell, just back off. Sorry bout all thsoe other monks who go around posting that all items under .5 should be monk usable.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 17 2002 at 6:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I totally agree that if one person could benefit from an item more than me....or if that person using the item over me would benefit the guild, then I usually drop out of it. But, when this thing dropped off Tormax...you bet your sweet **** I was in on this thing. Only 1 belt better for druids (as stated on EQ Druids) and that is the Belt of Dwarf Slaying. Yes this item has low weight which is good for a monk, but the high wisdom on the item is why it is a priest item. Im sure there are other belts out there that a Monk could get that have a low weight on them. But, if that belt doesnt have the saves this one does then get the saves somewhere else. This whole game is one big balancing act with armor and finding the right combination of gear to where at any given time is what makes your character good or bad at that time.
RE: Monk shmonk
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2003 at 10:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793866514
5 posts
monks cant use this....why does everyone always post something about monks? who cares about monks anyway most people who complain about them dont even play a monk, or people who say that " this item is nice for a monk" if a monk sees it he will know if it is good or not so please just stop using the word monk lol
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 28 2001 at 7:53 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) shoulda been a monk sash
RE: wtf
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2002 at 2:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767089005
View User Forum
212 posts
Why is it, that every item under 1.0 wt should automatically be a monk item?
That 6wis ring is 0.1 wt.....MONK ITEM
That 25hp/35mana earring is 0.1 wt...MONK ITEM

I hate to say it, but it gets old. I know I know..Monks have a weight limit before being hindered, however not EVERY item under 1.0 wt should automatically be monk item... is the Spider Fur Belt not good enough?

If your post was put in as a joke, my apologies. I am just getting sick of monk this because its low weight.

# Jan 09 2002 at 9:34 AM Rating: Default

Scholar
59 posts
I like it. Realy. Does a piece have low wight it's either "MONK ITEM!" or "WHY NOT FOR MONKS?".
Right, the wight is low. Right, the resists are nice. Right, 90HP never hurts. But what do you want with 15wis and 90mana? There are many other realy nice belts a monk could wear. Check the discussion for this belts and you will read for the better one "Never ever should a caster roll for this belt!" So let this belt for the wis casters.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 20 2001 at 11:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Granted, clerics and druids would have no use for the haste, but shamans are meleers as well as casters. I'm sure they'd love even a minor haste to assist in their combat duties.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 21 2001 at 3:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) why do you say that, there is no haste on this item.
RE: Seriously, haste would be nice
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2001 at 9:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753880975
139 posts
When exactly would a 55+ shaman melee? Or 50+ shaman for that matter. Unless you mean farming orcs in CC for your wyvern hide items. Sure maybe then I can see haste being useful. No duel wield, no double attack, kinda makes a poor excuse for melee. And before I get flamed yes I know Pallies and SK get no duel wield, they do have higher skill cap and get double attack.
▲ Page top
RE: Seriously, haste would be nice
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2002 at 11:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771735110
8 posts
Well about the shaman-meleeing business : if there is any caster-class that would melee besides normal melee-classes, it would be the shaman.
Im a 54 shaman myself, and do melee occasionally (not in groups of course). Shamans are able to get quite good AC (I know one who easily has over 1100AC), my strength is always 255, my dex sta agi easily reach 190 all, I have alacrity (40%) and soon celerity (50% I believe), we have a pet that doubles for 51, I hit for max 85 or so and on top of that my weapon procs a 265DD. Every mob I fight is slowed down to 70%. With a good haste item I should reach 70% haste. So dont tell me shamans have no use for haste.

Its no use for a shaman to melee while in group, but solo we melee a lot (at least I do hehe). A shaman from that point of view is actually a warrior (with pet) who can heal, buff, speed himself (and pet), and slow, debuff, dot, nuke mobs, but who lacks dual wield and double attack.

At lvl 54 I have no trouble putting a blue mob into the grave. And another blue 5 mins later. A warrior, even with max haste, cant do that. So believe me, haste IS useful for shamans.

Astyanax
54 Barbarian Mystic
Antonius Bayle

Edited, Sat Jan 5 11:37:21 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Seriously, haste would be nice
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2003 at 4:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255908367
View User Forum
22 posts
Personally I do not play a shaman, but a RL friend does play a 65th shaman on my server. Hes soloed Yeldema and just about everything else he feels challenged to do. Although his pet is the scariest thing fully buffed, he still melee's quite a bit. Especially since he got canni5, he never sits down for mana, so might as well stab a few mobs with his spear..

Anyway.. That was totally off topic, since this item does not have haste..

Another off topic haste remark for casters.. Clerics are quite adept at soloing dark blue undead when they get the higher level hammer spells. With a haste, your hitting that much more often, and proccing more often. Making it much easier to kill those nasty undead with less heals in between..

Im done :)


Edited, Fri Jan 24 04:11:34 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Seriously, haste would be nice
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2002 at 7:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757457355
9 posts
I have to agree to Astyanax in this.. Im only 52 (53 tonight) and I solo hornets or giants at giant outpost in BW when Im not able to get a group.. The only hard thing to solo there is the named giant who is to hard for me and my pet.. Otherwise, if my slow isnt resisted its pretty easy to take those guys.. Great xp though..

This has nothing with the item to do but I just wanted to say it =P

Salorm 52
Antonius Bayle

Not really for melee of course, but I do know that shamans get sumoned and hit a lot while trying to slow mobs. So each and every bit of ac and hp counts.

Roughly the same applies to clerics (never seen them sumoned much though) and druids (but that's mostly because of snaring/nuking to early or overnuking)
